notes: 30 description lines, 5 per depth zone (P6). Selection is deterministic per NFT (hash of coin_id + global index), so metadata regenerates byte-identically.
Voice: heavy, hopeful, meme-literate, never desperate. No financial claims (spec Risk 3).

surface: They watched from the lifeboats and called it mercy. The ship kept burning anyway.
The headlines wrote the obituary before the hull was even cold.
Everyone swore they'd stay. The horizon is full of people who swore.
Salvage record, surface zone: laughter carries farther over water than grief.
The tourists photographed the sinking. Nobody photographed who stayed.
sunlight: From above you can still see the deck rails. Told-you-so travels at the speed of light.
Twenty meters down, the wreck is still warm.
The doubters were right about the sinking. They were wrong about everything after.
Salvage record, sunlight zone: the water forgives nothing and forgets less.
Light reaches here. Conviction has to swim deeper.
twilight: The first divers found the lights still on below deck.
Loyalty is a kind of pressure tolerance.
Salvage record, twilight zone: someone kept the boiler fed the whole time.
Down here the doubt thins out. It can't hold its breath this long.
Two hundred meters of water between you and the people who said it was over.
midnight: The crew never left. They just stopped answering the surface.
Salvage record, midnight zone: found the mess hall laughing at its own jokes.
No sunlight for a thousand meters and the memes are still posting.
The pressure down here would crush a tourist. The crew calls it Tuesday.
They welded a new bulkhead and named it after everyone who left.
abyssal: The ship isn't sinking. It's being rebuilt where no one bothers to look.
Salvage record, abyssal zone: sparks look like stars when it's dark enough.
Four thousand meters down, somebody is measuring twice.
The forge never asked permission from the surface.
What the ocean was given, the shipwrights are taking back.
hadal: At the bottom of everything there is a light, and it is not the sun.
Salvage record, hadal zone: the wizards were here first and never doubted.
Hope never sinks. It just goes where the tourists can't follow.
The source is not a place. It's the ones still holding the torch at 6,000 meters.
Deeper than despair there is only building.
